mapper.sql: id, event_id, topic, event_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into outbox_event(event_id, topic, event_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at) values(#{eventId}, #{topic}, #{eventKey}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id from outbox_event where status in ('NEW', 'RETRY') and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{now}) order by id asc limit #{limit} for update
mapper.update: update outbox_event set status = 'RETRY', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = #{now} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from outbox_event where status = 'FAILED' order by id asc limit #{limit}
